codeReview.summary: The final-testing feature is a validation and integration phase that verified all baseline validators pass (lint: 5 warnings non-blocking, typecheck: pass, build: pass) and committed existing validation review files from the sync milestone scrutiny. No new implementation code was added - the feature's work was confirming the existing implementation's quality and properly committing the scrutiny reports. The sync system stub blocking issue (syncItemToRemote) was previously fixed in commit 32fb8af and compiled into dist/main/syncDatabase.js which was committed in this feature's commit.

issues.description: syncItemToRemote function uses string concatenation instead of template literals for path building. While the prior blocking issue was fixed (actual fs.copyFileSync is now used), the workaround for template literal issues (as noted in fix-sync-stubs observation) may indicate environment-specific encoding issues worth documenting.

The Sidebar component file exists in src/renderer/components/Sidebar.tsx but was not part of the final-testing commit a2584b2. The working tree shows uncommitted changes to this file and App.tsx. This appears to be from a parallel ui-sidebar-navigation feature (512a1a4) that was completed but has subsequent uncommitted modifications.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker followed the validation procedure correctly by running lint, typecheck, and build validators and confirming they pass. The transcript skeleton was not retrievable (jq query failed) but the handoff indicates all verification steps were completed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff shows npm run lint (exit 0, 5 warnings), npm run typecheck (exit 0), npm run build (exit 0) all passed successfully.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker committed files without any issues, properly following the git commit convention. However, the working tree shows uncommitted changes after the commit, suggesting subsequent modifications were made to Sidebar.tsx and App.tsx that weren't committed in this feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git status shows M dist/main/userDatabase.js, M src/main/userDatabase.ts, M src/renderer/components/Sidebar.tsx, M dist/renderer/index.html as uncommitted changes after commit a2584b2.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker used standard commands from services.yaml (npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run build). No additional services were started.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff verification shows all commands used are defined in services.yaml commands section.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The lint warnings (5 unused variables) are cosmetic and do not affect functionality. However, they represent technical debt that could be cleaned up. The warnings appear to be from the user management and sync modules.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: npm run lint output shows 5 warnings (unused variables like 'error', 'err', '_savedUser') but 0 errors.

summary: The final-testing feature completed its integration testing and verification phase successfully. All baseline validators pass (lint with 5 non-blocking warnings, typecheck pass, build pass). The feature properly committed the validation review JSONs from the sync milestone scrutiny (admin-features, fix-sync-stubs, sync-system). The blocking issue from the original sync-system review (stub syncItemToRemote) was confirmed fixed and compiled into dist/. The worker followed the validation procedure correctly and returned to the orchestrator with success state.
